title: Wasabi's Basic Pack
description: A modpack aimed at keeping Minecraft "Minecraft" but improving player experience.
body:
# Play Minecraft how it was supposed to be!
**Do you like playing Minecraft but feel the mechanics and gameplay could be a little bit more... Refined? Well this is the pack for you!**



This is a light weight modpack that consists of performance boosting and quality of life mods, but also introduces small but new additions to the game.


# It was like nothing was added!
Wasabi's Basic Pack has less than 100 mods so you wont have to worry about long loading times and buggy interactions with certain mods conflicting with each other since most of them are opimization mods anyway.

Examples of these new additions are:
- Tom's Simple Storage
- Extended Drawers
- Compact Storage
- Various Macaw mods
- Trash Cans
- Waystones
- Item Collectors (We know how laggy those hoppers can get)
- Andddddd... **A MEASURING TAPE!**

The intent of this pack was to just add some QOL to the game for things we found a bit tedious or frustrating, So no nuclear reactors, moon colonization, dimensional doors or ridiculously overpowered items in the game. Just Minecraft as... **Minecraft**.

# 
_(This was intended for multiplayer however feel free to use it for your solo world. If you are playing on a server i would recommend at least 8gb for this pack)_
